detail.description:
Dive into the exciting world of "Match Villains" and join our unusual family of aristocratic thieves on a thrilling adventure to gather a collection of the world's most precious artifacts. 

Break through layers of obstacles with clever matches and unleash powerful combos in a game where every level is a new heist!

"Match Villains" features:

• Uniquely Challenging Levels: Experience a fresh twist in match-3 gameplay with multi-layered obstacles, from the hidden sublayers to the mysterious over
detail.releaseNotes:
Big plans, royal problems. 100 new levels await!

NEW ITEM: TWIN TILES! Find the matching twin to clear the pair. Simple idea, suspiciously difficult board.

NEW SAFE CRACKERS: MEXICO! Crack the safes, collect the rewards, and unlock a fiesta-ready NEW STYLE.

NEW EVENT: TEAM MISSION! Pick a mission, join the crew, and remember: Villains who work together… probably split the rewards later.

NEW POSTER: CROWN ME MAYBE! London called. The crown answered. Now the getaway begins.
